creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 1.18.2 (changelog is long, see http://www.busybox.net for details)
- Fix on 9-CURRENT; references to utmp.h removed

Submitted by:	Chris Rees <utisoft@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Please bear in mind that patch-editors-vi.c and patch-include-platform.h have
been removed.

I continued with Luigi's patch-002 file because I didn't want to bloat the
repository, and since I've sent these patches to the Busybox team (and they've
been applied) they shouldn't be needed for future versions.

The patch for vi.c has also been left out, since it only refers to unsupported releases; #if (__FreeBSD_version < 603103) || (__FreeBSD_version < 700109 && __FreeBSD_version >= 700000) || (__FreeBSD_version < 800034 && __FreeBSD_version >=800000)

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--PApwYY8xRAYqjVh7CsgTyMVHxuGO5nLSkcjIt27eN2ZWGEP8
